title: Indulgent Irish Soda Bread Gratin
description: A rich Irish dish featuring fermented, flaky soda bread topped with a tangy BBQ sauce and broiled to perfection. Perfect for a weekend dinner or special occasion.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: use a high-protein flour for a more tender crumb

ingredients.name: baking soda
ingredients.notes: make sure it's fresh for best results

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: use kosher salt for a more complex flavor

ingredients.name: buttermilk
ingredients.notes: you can make a substitute by mixing 1 cup of milk with 1 tablespoon of white vinegar

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: use high-quality, European-style butter for the best flavor

ingredients.name: BBQ sauce
ingredients.notes: use a sugar-free BBQ sauce to keep the dish friendly to those with dietary restrictions

ingredients.name: shredded cheddar cheese
ingredients.notes: use a high-quality, sharp cheddar for the best flavor

ingredients.name: fresh thyme
ingredients.notes: use the leaves and buds of the thyme plant for the best flavor

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, whisk together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
Add the buttermilk and mix the dough until it comes together in a shaggy mass.
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead it for 5-7 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
